requirement_topic.en: Lithium-Ion Cell and Battery Safety for Industrial Applications
requirement_topic.zh: 工业应用锂离子电芯与电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: 工業應用鋰離子電芯與電池安全

summary.en: EN IEC 62619:2022 sets safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries used in industrial applications, including BESS. It covers abuse testing (overcharge, over-discharge, short-circuit, thermal, crush), BMS requirements, and marking. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU requires harmonised standard compliance; EN IEC 62619 is listed in the LVD Official Journal as a harmonised standard. EN IEC 63056 covers secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in electrical energy storage systems.
summary.zh: EN IEC 62619:2022 规定了工业应用（含BESS）二次锂电芯与电池组的安全要求，涵盖滥用测试（过充、过放、短路、热冲击、挤压）、电池管理系统要求及标识。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU获取CE标志须符合相应协调标准；EN IEC 62619已列入低电压指令官方公报协调标准清单。EN IEC 63056规定用于电气储能系统的二次锂电芯与电池安全要求。
summary.zht: EN IEC 62619:2022 規定工業應用（含BESS）二次鋰電芯與電池組的安全要求，涵蓋濫用測試（過充、過放、短路、熱衝擊、擠壓）、電池管理系統要求及標識。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌須符合相應協調標準；EN IEC 62619已列入低電壓指令官方公報協調標準清單。EN IEC 63056規定用於電氣儲能系統的二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求。

summary.en: GB 36276-2023 (Electric Energy Storage Lithium-Ion Batteries) is the mandatory Chinese national standard for lithium-ion batteries used in power energy storage systems. It specifies safety performance requirements including electrical, mechanical, environmental, and abuse tests for cells and battery packs. GB/T 36276-2018 (superseded by GB 36276-2023) was the previous version. Testing must be conducted by a CNAS/CMA-accredited lab and type-approval submitted to the National Energy Administration or grid operators before market entry.
summary.zh: GB 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）是中国强制性国家标准，适用于电力储能系统用锂离子电池，规定电芯及电池组的安全性能要求，包括电气、机械、环境及滥用测试。GB/T 36276-2018为前一版本（已由2023版取代）。测试须由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行，并向国家能源局或电网企业提交型式认可，方可入市。
summary.zht: GB 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）是中國強制性國家標準，適用於電力儲能系統用鋰離子電池，規定電芯及電池組的安全性能要求，包括電氣、機械、環境及濫用測試。GB/T 36276-2018為前一版本（已由2023版取代）。測試須由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行，並向國家能源局或電網企業提交型式認可，方可入市。

gap.en: GB 36276 test protocols and pass/fail criteria differ from EN IEC 62619 in several areas: nail penetration test conditions, thermal runaway propagation testing (required by EN IEC 62619 Annex C, not directly equivalent in GB 36276-2023), and BMS functional safety depth. EU importers require a Declaration of Conformity and technical file under LVD; Chinese type-approval certificates are not recognised by EU notified bodies. Manufacturers must re-test to EN IEC 62619 / EN IEC 63056 at an EU-recognised lab and issue EU DoC even if GB 36276 certification exists.
gap.zh: GB 36276与EN IEC 62619在多项测试协议和判定准则上存在差异：针刺测试条件、热失控蔓延测试（EN IEC 62619附录C要求，GB 36276-2023无直接对应）、电池管理系统功能安全深度。欧盟进口商依据低电压指令须提供符合性声明及技术文件；中国型式认可证书不被欧盟通知机构认可。即便已取得GB 36276认证，制造商仍须在欧盟认可实验室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: GB 36276與EN IEC 62619在多項測試協議和判定準則上存在差異：針刺測試條件、熱失控蔓延測試（EN IEC 62619附錄C要求，GB 36276-2023無直接對應）、電池管理系統功能安全深度。歐盟進口商依據低電壓指令須提供符合性聲明及技術文件；中國型式認可證書不被歐盟公告機構認可。即便已取得GB 36276認證，製造商仍須在歐盟認可實驗室重新按EN IEC 62619/EN IEC 63056測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU required for market access in EU
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 36276-2023 is a mandatory national standard (强制性国家标准) enforced by SAMR and NEA

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and Council; IEC/CENELEC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB 36276-2023 certification does not satisfy EU LVD requirements. Separate EN IEC 62619:2022 and/or EN IEC 63056:2020 testing at an EU-recognised laboratory and issuance of an EU Declaration of Conformity are required before placing BESS on the EU market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 36276-2023认证不满足欧盟低电压指令要求。在欧盟认可实验室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020测试，并出具欧盟符合性声明，方可在欧盟市场销售BESS产品。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 36276-2023認證不滿足歐盟低電壓指令要求。在歐盟認可實驗室完成EN IEC 62619:2022和/或EN IEC 63056:2020測試，並出具歐盟符合性聲明，方可在歐盟市場銷售BESS產品。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) Safety — System Level
requirement_topic.zh: 电池储能系统（BESS）整机安全
requirement_topic.zht: 電池儲能系統（BESS）整機安全

summary.en: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 Ed 2.0 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety requirements for grid-integrated electrical energy storage systems) defines system-level safety requirements for BESS connected to the grid, including hazard identification, risk assessment, thermal runaway propagation prevention, fire suppression, and installation safety. IEC 62933-5-2:2025 supersedes the 2020 edition (Ed 1.0). EN IEC 62040 series covers UPS and power conversion safety. Together with EN IEC 62619, these form the key harmonised standard framework for BESS CE marking in the EU. The EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 additionally imposes lifecycle, due-diligence, and carbon-footprint requirements on industrial batteries.
summary.zh: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 Ed 2.0（电气储能系统——并网电气储能系统安全要求）规定BESS系统级安全要求，涵盖危害识别、风险评估、热失控蔓延防护、消防及安装安全。IEC 62933-5-2:2025取代2020年版（Ed 1.0）。EN IEC 62040系列涵盖UPS及功率变换安全。上述标准与EN IEC 62619共同构成欧盟BESS CE标志的核心协调标准框架。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542另对工业电池提出全生命周期、尽职调查及碳足迹要求。
summary.zht: IEC 62933-5-2:2025 Ed 2.0（電氣儲能系統——並網電氣儲能系統安全要求）規定BESS系統級安全要求，涵蓋危害識別、風險評估、熱失控蔓延防護、消防及安裝安全。IEC 62933-5-2:2025取代2020年版（Ed 1.0）。EN IEC 62040系列涵蓋UPS及功率變換安全。上述標準與EN IEC 62619共同構成歐盟BESS CE標誌的核心協調標準框架。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542另對工業電池提出全生命週期、盡職調查及碳足跡要求。

summary.en: GB/T 36558-2022 (General Technical Requirements for Electric Energy Storage Systems Connected to Power Systems) specifies system-level technical and safety requirements for grid-connected BESS in China, including electrical performance, protection, communication, and safety functions. It is a recommended (non-mandatory) national standard but is referenced in grid-connection agreements with State Grid and China Southern Power Grid, making it effectively mandatory for grid-connected projects. No direct Chinese equivalent to IEC 62933-5-2 thermal runaway propagation annex exists [UNVERIFIED].
summary.zh: GB/T 36558-2022（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）规定中国并网储能系统的系统级技术与安全要求，包括电气性能、保护、通信及安全功能。该标准为推荐性国家标准，但在国家电网和南方电网的并网协议中被引用，使其对并网项目实际上具有强制效力。目前无与IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延附录直接对应的中国标准[未经核实]。
summary.zht: GB/T 36558-2022（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）規定中國並網儲能系統的系統級技術與安全要求，包括電氣性能、保護、通信及安全功能。該標準為推薦性國家標準，但在國家電網和南方電網的並網協議中被引用，使其對並網項目實際上具有強制效力。目前無與IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延附錄直接對應的中國標準[未經核實]。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 34131-2023 [UNVERIFIED — battery management system for ESS]

gap.en: IEC 62933-5-2 thermal runaway propagation prevention requirements (Annex B) and fire-suppression system mandates have no direct equivalent in Chinese national standards as of this writing [UNVERIFIED]. EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 imposes due-diligence, carbon footprint declaration, and battery passport requirements not present in Chinese regulation. Chinese exporters must conduct system-level risk assessment per IEC 62933-5-2 and obtain EU DoC; GB/T 36558 compliance reports are not accepted as EU market-access evidence.
gap.zh: IEC 62933-5-2热失控蔓延防护要求（附录B）及消防系统强制规定在现行中国国家标准中无直接对应[未经核实]。欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542对尽职调查、碳足迹声明及电池护照的要求在中国法规中亦无对应。中国出口商须按IEC 62933-5-2进行系统级风险评估并取得欧盟符合性声明；GB/T 36558合规报告不被接受为欧盟市场准入证明。
gap.zht: IEC 62933-5-2熱失控蔓延防護要求（附錄B）及消防系統強制規定在現行中國國家標準中無直接對應[未經核實]。歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542對盡職調查、碳足跡聲明及電池護照的要求在中國法規中亦無對應。中國出口商須按IEC 62933-5-2進行系統級風險評估並取得歐盟符合性聲明；GB/T 36558合規報告不被接受為歐盟市場準入證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking and EU Battery Regulation compliance required; IEC 62933-5-2 referenced as key harmonised standard under LVD
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) but effectively mandatory for grid-connection approval by State Grid / China Southern Power Grid

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / European Parliament and Council; IEC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558 compliance does not satisfy EU requirements. System-level conformity assessment per IEC 62933-5-2, CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU, and compliance with EU Battery Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 (including battery passport from 2027) are all required for EU market access.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558合规不满足欧盟要求。在欧盟市场销售须完成IEC 62933-5-2系统级符合性评估、依据低电压指令2014/35/EU取得CE标志，并符合欧盟电池法规（EU）2023/1542（含2027年起实施的电池护照要求）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558合規不滿足歐盟要求。在歐盟市場銷售須完成IEC 62933-5-2系統級符合性評估、依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌，並符合歐盟電池法規（EU）2023/1542（含2027年起實施的電池護照要求）。

requirement_topic.en: Low Voltage Directive — Electrical Safety for BESS Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: 低电压指令——BESS设备电气安全
requirement_topic.zht: 低電壓指令——BESS設備電氣安全

summary.en: LVD 2014/35/EU requires all electrical equipment operating between 50–1000 V AC or 75–1500 V DC placed on the EU market to be safe and CE marked. For BESS, this covers the battery system, inverter/PCS, switchgear, and enclosures. The manufacturer must prepare a technical file, conduct conformity assessment (typically internal production control for harmonised-standard-covered products), and issue an EU Declaration of Conformity. Harmonised standards EN IEC 62619, EN IEC 63056, and IEC 62933-5-2 provide presumption of conformity with LVD essential safety requirements.
summary.zh: 低电压指令2014/35/EU要求在欧盟市场销售的所有工作电压在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC范围内的电气设备须安全并加贴CE标志。对于BESS，该指令适用于电池系统、逆变器/PCS、开关设备及外壳。制造商须准备技术文件，进行符合性评估（协调标准覆盖产品通常为内部生产控制），并出具欧盟符合性声明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2协调标准可推定符合低电压指令基本安全要求。
summary.zht: 低電壓指令2014/35/EU要求在歐盟市場銷售的所有工作電壓在50–1000V AC或75–1500V DC範圍內的電氣設備須安全並加貼CE標誌。對於BESS，該指令適用於電池系統、逆變器/PCS、開關設備及外殼。製造商須準備技術文件，進行符合性評估（協調標準覆蓋產品通常為內部生產控制），並出具歐盟符合性聲明。EN IEC 62619、EN IEC 63056及IEC 62933-5-2協調標準可推定符合低電壓指令基本安全要求。

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the LVD CE-marking framework. Electrical safety for BESS in China is governed by GB 36276-2023 (cell/battery level), GB/T 36558-2022 (system level), and sector-specific grid-connection technical specifications issued by State Grid Corporation and China Southern Power Grid. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) applies to certain electrical products but BESS systems are not currently within CCC scope [UNVERIFIED — scope may have changed post-2024]. Safety certification is primarily managed through NEA project approval and grid-operator technical review.
summary.zh: 中国没有与低电压指令CE标志框架直接对应的制度。BESS电气安全由GB 36276-2023（电芯/电池组层面）、GB/T 36558-2022（系统层面）及国家电网、南方电网发布的行业并网技术规范共同规范。CCC强制认证适用于部分电气产品，但BESS系统目前不在CCC范围内[未经核实——2024年后范围或有变化]。安全认证主要通过国家能源局项目核准及电网企业技术审查实施。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與低電壓指令CE標誌框架直接對應的制度。BESS電氣安全由GB 36276-2023（電芯/電池組層面）、GB/T 36558-2022（系統層面）及國家電網、南方電網發布的行業並網技術規範共同規範。CCC強制認證適用於部分電氣產品，但BESS系統目前不在CCC範圍內[未經核實——2024年後範圍或有變化]。安全認證主要通過國家能源局項目核准及電網企業技術審查實施。

standards_or_laws: CCC (3C) certification scheme [UNVERIFIED scope for BESS]

gap.en: China's project-approval and grid-operator review model does not produce the product-level EU DoC and technical file required by LVD 2014/35/EU. Chinese exporters must appoint an EU Authorised Representative, compile an LVD-compliant technical file (risk assessment, test reports to harmonised standards, instructions), and self-declare or engage a notified body. No bilateral mutual recognition agreement (MRA) covers electrical safety between China and the EU for BESS products, so Chinese test reports must be supplemented or replaced by tests at EU-recognised (ILAC MRA) laboratories.
gap.zh: 中国的项目核准和电网企业审查模式不产生低电压指令2014/35/EU所要求的产品级欧盟符合性声明及技术文件。中国出口商须在欧盟指定授权代表，编制符合低电压指令的技术文件（风险评估、协调标准测试报告、说明书），并进行自我声明或委托通知机构。中欧之间就BESS产品电气安全尚无双边互认协议，因此中国测试报告须在欧盟认可（ILAC MRA）实验室补充或重新测试。
gap.zht: 中國的項目核准和電網企業審查模式不產生低電壓指令2014/35/EU所要求的產品級歐盟符合性聲明及技術文件。中國出口商須在歐盟指定授權代表，編制符合低電壓指令的技術文件（風險評估、協調標準測試報告、說明書），並進行自我聲明或委託公告機構。中歐之間就BESS產品電氣安全尚無雙邊互認協議，因此中國測試報告須在歐盟認可（ILAC MRA）實驗室補充或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LVD 2014/35/EU is a binding EU directive; CE marking is a legal prerequisite for EU market access
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory CE/LVD framework; safety governed through project-approval and grid-operator review processes

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese safety approvals (NEA project approval, grid-operator certificates, GB 36276 test reports) do not constitute LVD compliance. EU market access requires a product-level EU Declaration of Conformity, an LVD-compliant technical file, CE marking, and an appointed EU Authorised Representative.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国安全批准文件（国家能源局项目核准、电网企业证书、GB 36276测试报告）不构成低电压指令合规。进入欧盟市场须具备产品级欧盟符合性声明、符合低电压指令的技术文件、CE标志，并指定欧盟授权代表。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國安全批准文件（國家能源局項目核准、電網企業證書、GB 36276測試報告）不構成低電壓指令合規。進入歐盟市場須具備產品級歐盟符合性聲明、符合低電壓指令的技術文件、CE標誌，並指定歐盟授權代表。
